result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: No
JUSTIFICATION: There is a massive dimensional gap between the Compton frequency ($\nu_C = mc^2/h$) and the Unruh temperature/frequency associated with cosmological acceleration ($a \approx cH_0$). The Unruh temperature $T = \hbar a / (2\pi c k_B)$ corresponds to a frequency $\nu_U \approx a/2\pi c \approx H_0/2\pi$, which is many orders of magnitude smaller than the Compton frequency of any known particle.
